Off Calendar Jun-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Anne Acuna, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Acie Maxwell
Shelley K. Tinkoff, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Foster Wheeler LLC

After hearing, Plaintiff Acie Maxwell's motion to compel defendant's Foster Wheeler LLC's person most knowledgeable for deposition is Granted. Compliance by July 23, 2008. Plaintiff and Defendant agree that deposition not necesary at this time if timely production. Parties to meet and confer. Commissioner: Bruce Chan; Court Reporter: Kimberly R. Jensen, CSR # 12552
